title: DC Edit | Tri-colour On World Top Chess Tables
description: On Wednesday, Vaishali Rameshbabu turned the tables on a tight field to defeat Russia’s Kateryna Lagno in the final round and edged ahead of Bibisara Assuabayeva of Kazakhstan by half-a-point (8.5-8) to earn her place on the table across China’s Ju Wenjun in the Women’s World Championship match to be held later this year
